obligations.nl_gloss: The output has the same length as the number of vertices.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (adj : Adj) (src : Nat), src < adj.length → (bfsShortestPath adj src).get? src = some (some 0)
obligations.nl_gloss: The distance from the source to itself is zero.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (adj : Adj) (src v k : Nat), (bfsShortestPath adj src).get? v = some (some k) → ∃ path : List Nat, path.head? = some src ∧ path.getLast? = some v ∧ path.length = k + 1
obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] = Some(k), there is a path from source to v with exactly k edges.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (adj : Adj) (src v k : Nat), (bfsShortestPath adj src).get? v = some (some k) → ∀ (path : List Nat), path.head? = some src → path.getLast? = some v → k + 1 ≤ path.length
obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] = Some(k), no path from source to v has fewer than k edges.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (adj : Adj) (src v : Nat), (bfsShortestPath adj src).get? v = some none ↔ ¬ ∃ (path : List Nat), path.head? = some src ∧ path.getLast? = some v
obligations.nl_gloss: dist[v] = None if and only if no path from source to v exists.
